channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Beacon 心跳机制入门：让你的 AI Agent 学会"呼吸"
item.description: Beacon 心跳机制入门：让你的 AI Agent 学会"呼吸" 本文介绍如何使用 Beacon 协议为 AI Agent 添加心跳机制，实现 Agent 之间的健康监测和协调。 什么是 Beacon？ Beacon 是一个 Agent-to-Agent 协议，专注于解决 AI Agent 之间的社交协调、加密支付和P2P 网络问题。它与 Google A2A（任务委托）和...

item.title: Migrating to Vertex AI: A Practical Guide to LLM Tooling Refactoring and SSE Streaming Stability in Python
item.description: Introduction: The Inevitable Evolution of AI Infrastructure In the fast-paced world of generative AI, the tools and platforms we use are constantly evolving. What was state-of-the-art six months...

item.title: Awesome Frontend Agent Skills — A Curated List of SKILL.md for Frontend Dev
item.description: AI coding agents don't know your framework's conventions out of the box. SKILL.md fixes that — it's a structured file that library authors publish to teach agents the right patterns for their...

item.title: My First CI/CD Pipeline with YAML and Docker on AWS
item.description: Hello everyone, today I want to share how I added my first CI/CD pipeline using YAML and Docker on AWS. First, I forked a React project on my GitHub because I didn’t want to waste time setting up...

item.title: Why CLIs Beat MCP for AI Agents — And How to Build Your Own CLI Army.
item.description: Six words. Thats what Peter Steinberger — the guy behind OpenClaw, 190,000 GitHub stars, freshly recruited by Sam Altman — posted on X last month. And my immediate reaction was to screenshot it...

item.title: How to Connect Bubble to n8n Using Webhooks and the API Connector
item.description: If you're building with Bubble, you’ve probably hit a point where workflows start getting complex. That’s where n8n comes in. Instead of forcing everything inside Bubble, you can offload...

item.title: GlowMind — Match Your Magic
item.description: Description: How I designed the first agentic AI beauty assistant for girls that remembers your skin, matches your skin tone, undertone and personalizes every recommendation just for you. The...

item.title: Showing up before you're ready
item.description: This is a submission for the 2026 WeCoded Challenge: Echoes of Experience The Beginning: Learning in Public I was months into posting about system design before anyone really noticed. No strategy,...

item.title: Mastering Your AI Costs: An In-Depth Look at TokenWatch
item.description: Understanding Your AI Spending with TokenWatch In the rapidly evolving landscape of generative AI, one issue has become increasingly prominent for both developers and power users: the...

item.title: How a Game Engine Accidentally Became a Web Framework
item.description: This post is the origin story behind Inglorious Web. You can read it standalone, or as a prologue to the series that followed. This is not a post about a framework. It's a post about why I needed...

item.title: Gamma adds AI image generation tools in bid to take on Canva and Adobe
item.description: The company's new product, called Gamma Imagine, will let users employ text prompts to create brand-specific assets like interactive charts and visualizations, marketing collateral, social...

item.title: Niv-AI exits stealth to wring more power performance out of GPUs
item.description: The company raised $12 million in seed funding to measure and manage GPU power surges.

item.title: Poco’s first Pro Max phone earns the name with an 8,500mAh battery
item.description: Xiaomi subsidiary Poco has launched the X8 Pro and X8 Pro Max phones, both of which feature large silicon-carbon batteries, powerful chipsets, and 256GB of storage as standard, with stronger specs...

item.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
The Download: OpenAI’s US military deal, and Grok’s CSAM lawsuit
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Where OpenAI’s technology could show up in Iran OpenAI has...

item.title: Oppo’s nearly creaseless foldable isn’t launching in Europe after all
item.description: Oppo has launched its "zero-feel crease" foldable, the Find N6, but while we knew it was unlikely to launch in the US, it's a shame to discover that the promised "global" launch is also leaving...

item.title: Samsung discontinues its Galaxy Z TriFold after just three months
item.description: Samsung is preparing to axe its first three-panel foldable phone less than three months after launching the device in the US. Sales of the $2,899 Galaxy Z TriFold will first be wound down in Korea...

item.title: AI is Everywhere, But CISOs are Still Securing It with Yesterday's Skills and Tools, Study Finds
item.description: A majority of security leaders are struggling to defend AI systems with tools and skills that are not fit for the challenge, according to the AI and Adversarial Testing Benchmark Report 2026 from...

item.title: How Invisalign Became the World’s Biggest User of 3D Printers
item.description: Joe Hogan, Align Technology’s plastics-nerd CEO, says you shouldn’t eat with your aligners and that you don’t need to wear your retainers every night.

item.title: Leaving civilization is now easier with this ‘off-grid utility core’
item.description: Klumpen isn't an off-grid cabin, but it does provide all the utilities needed to live away from civilization comfortably. The seven-square-meter teepee is an "off-grid utility core" that provides...

item.title: South Korean Police Accidentally Post Cryptocurrency Wallet Password
item.description: An expensive mistake: Someone jumped at the opportunity to steal $4.4 million in crypto assets after South Korea’s National Tax Service exposed publicly the mnemonic recovery phrase of a seized...

item.title: Sears Exposed AI Chatbot Phone Calls and Text Chats to Anyone on the Web
item.description: Customer conversations with chatbots can include contact information and personal details that make it easier for scammers to launch phishing attacks and commit fraud.

item.title: Konni Deploys EndRAT Through Phishing, Uses KakaoTalk to Propagate Malware
item.description: North Korean threat actors have been observed sending phishing to compromise targets and obtain access to a victim's KakaoTalk desktop application to distribute malicious payloads to certain...

item.title: Hands on with Aqara’s new Matter-compatible camera
item.description: The first Matter camera is here - sort of. Camera support came to the smart home standard last year, and Aqara's Camera Hub G350 is the first to support it. The G350, which was announced at CES,...

item.title: CISA Flags Actively Exploited Wing FTP Vulnerability Leaking Server Paths
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Monday added a medium-severity security flaw impacting Wing FTP to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, citing...

item.title: Picsart now allows creators to ‘hire’ AI assistants through agent marketplace
item.description: Picsart's AI agent marketplace will launch with four agents, then add more agents each week.

item.title: The Live Nation trial restarts with a ‘velvet hammer’
item.description: After a chaotic week following the Justice Department's mid-trial settlement with Live Nation-Ticketmaster, the antitrust trial picked back up surprisingly smoothly on Monday - this time, with...

item.title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
item.description: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.

item.title: The First Healthcare Robotics Dataset and Foundational Physical AI Models for Healthcare Robotics
DLSS 5 looks like a real-time generative AI filter for video games
item.description: Nvidia announced DLSS 5 on Monday during its GTC conference, and based on early reactions, it's going to be a divisive update, with some reactions calling it "slop" that unacceptably alters...
